form.label: datasensAI Telemetry Value Dashboard
form.description: Demo environment: synthetic data from 1stmile CSV. All queries filter by datasensai_run_id.

search.query: `datasensai_volume_search` $datasensai_run_id$ | stats sum(`datasensai_volume_field()`) as total_gb | eval total_gb=round(total_gb, 2)
`datasensai_volume_search` $datasensai_run_id$ | stats sum(`datasensai_volume_field()`) as daily_gb by index | eval daily_gb=round(daily_gb, 2) | sort - daily_gb | head 10
`datasensai_volume_search` $datasensai_run_id$ | stats sum(`datasensai_volume_field()`) as daily_gb by sourcetype | eval daily_gb=round(daily_gb, 2) | sort - daily_gb | head 10

panel.title: High Volume Low Search Coverage (Optimization Candidates)

search.query: `datasensai_volume_search` $datasensai_run_id$ | stats sum(`datasensai_volume_field()`) as daily_gb by sourcetype | join type=left sourcetype [ search `datasensai_audit_search` $datasensai_run_id$ | stats count as search_count by sourcetype_accessed | rename sourcetype_accessed as sourcetype ] | fillnull value=0 search_count | where daily_gb > 0.5 AND search_count < 5 | eval daily_gb=round(daily_gb, 2) | sort - daily_gb

`datasensai_volume_search` $datasensai_run_id$ | stats sum(`datasensai_volume_field()`) as daily_gb by sourcetype | join type=left sourcetype [ search `datasensai_audit_search` $datasensai_run_id$ | stats count as search_count by sourcetype_accessed | rename sourcetype_accessed as sourcetype ] | fillnull value=0 search_count | eval utilization_category=case( search_count=0, "Never Searched", search_count<5, "Rarely Searched", search_count<15, "Occasionally Searched", true(), "Frequently Searched" ) | stats count(distinct sourcetype) as sourcetype_count, sum(daily_gb) as total_gb by utilization_category
